full_text:
Zong Cheng (Shilin) 宗承 (世林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zong Cheng (宗承), styledShilin (世林), was born in Nanyang. Noted for his moral quality, snubbed Cao Cao so didn’t get big jobs. Due to age, refused to be Cao Rui’s Chancellor. Zong Cheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
